sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id SETTINGS engine_file_empty_if_not_exists = 1;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Alice') SETTINGS engine_file_allow_create_multiple_files = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Bob' WHERE id = 1 SETTINGS engine_file_truncate_on_insert = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table SETTINGS engine_file_skip_empty_files = 1;
